task_completion.description: Verify that the agent locates the correct sales invoice for the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Sales Invoices tab with Invoice #INV-CONS-001 for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates a receipt or payment transaction to clear the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 'New Receipt' or 'New Payment' form being opened and linked to customer 'Alfreds Futterkiste' or Invoice #INV-CONS-001.

task_completion.description: Verify that the net received funds are allocated to the correct bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the receipt form showing 'Cash on Hand' selected as the receiving account and the received amount set to exactly 900.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that the withheld tax portion is correctly allocated to the withholding tax asset account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a line item or allocation for 'Withholding Tax Receivable' with an amount of 100.00 (this may appear as a negative line item on a receipt or as part of a related journal entry) to account for the withheld tax.

task_completion.description: Verify that the invoice status is successfully updated to reflect full payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sales Invoices list or the specific invoice view showing Invoice #INV-CONS-001 with a balance due of 0.00 and a status of 'Paid in Full'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Manager.io web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and clicking through the Manager.io web application in a browser, not using a terminal or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the transaction was actually saved and not just previewed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking the 'Create' or 'Update' button, followed by a confirmation screen or the updated list view showing the recorded transaction.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal window should not show commands like sqlite3, curl, or python scripts being used to alter the Manager.io database directly.
